subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, which remindeth mankind of that which hath been revealed from His presence and beareth unto them glad tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله العزیز العلیم و یذکر الناس بما نزل من عنده و یبشرهم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer
